starting: *GLAURGHH* *GLAURGHHHHHHHH*
That's my greeting—ya like it? Or was it *GLAURGH*-bage?
Heheh... anyways...
I saw a review by NobleChadwick33 on Kelp. Said you made him a drink so good he quit his desk job...
...to pursue juggling. Respect. I could use that sort of uplift.
I've been doomscrolling for like a whole week nonstop...
Feelin' pretty sluggish... pretty sloshy...
Could ya make me a brew that fixes my lethargy... *GLAURGH*... whatever this is?
And maybe toss in a slice of lime...
neutral: *GLOURGH* This drink is alright... it hasn't really lifted my lethargy...
I... sorta question your *GLOURGH* potion-making skills, my guy...
satisfied: *Happy GLORGH* WOW! I feel INCREDIBLE... don't think I've felt this since I was a little globule...
My jelly body feels revitalized... I have just enough energy to hand ya a big ol' tip!
I'm inviting all my blobs to come gobble here! Thank you, Magetender!
angry: *Angry GLOARGH* WHAT THE SLIME IS THIS!?!
YOU THINK I'M SOME SORT OF SLOSH-BIN, HUH!?!
I'LL GIVE YOU A ROUGH *GLOARGH* YOU'LL REMEMBER!!!

starting: *GLAURGHH* *GLAURGHHHHHHHH*
I need your help...
My *GLAURGHH* is way too high after a Blob's Night Out...
Everything feels off... too sloshy...
Could you make me something to bring me back down?
Hopefully you still make good brews?
neutral: *GLOURGH* This drink doesn't make me feel any less sluggish..
I think I saw some tasty trash behind the tavern...
Yeah... that'll bring my mood up.
satisfied: *Happy GLORGH* WOW! My wiggly nature is back!
Thank you again, Magetender! I'll get my blobs out here soon!
angry: *Angry GLOARGH* THIS POTION IS SOME STRAIGHT SLOGFLORP!!!
I AM NOT SOME COMPOST BIN FOR YOU TO MAKE USE OF!!!

starting: Hello, Magetender! It is I—the most exquisite unicorn in town, Anita Caberneigh.
What's that? You haven't heard of me?
Dear me, it appears I’ve encountered a mage who lives under a rock.
You really ought to get out more.
Anyhow, I'd like to request a potion that will make me feel grounded and calm.
The pressures of remaining the fairest creature this town has ever seen do tend to weigh on me...
Oh, and do not forget a cherry on top, if you would.
neutral: Hmm. Not horrible... though you do seem to lack any exceptional knowledge of magetending.
I can only assume you were given this position through nepotism... or an internal reference. Am I getting warmer?
Farewell until next time.
satisfied: Ah, yes... this drink makes me feel so... tranquil.
As if I'm dancing on rainbows while fairies lift my fabulous mane.
Wh-why was I even worked up to begin with... please accept my generous tip as a symbol of my gratitude.
Farewell until next time, Magetender.
angry: WH-WHAT IN THE WORLD IS THIS!?!
MY BLOOD PRESSURE HAS ONLY RISEN!!!
MAGETENDER, YOUR INCOMPETENCE SHALL NOT GO UNPUNISHED!!!

starting: Hello, Magetender. It is I—once again—the most exquisite unicorn in town, Anita Caberneigh.
But really, I need no introduction at this point.. hush now... you know it's true.
I want a brew that brings me calm and composure.
Do ensure it is finished with a cherry on top .
And when you are done... maybe a bow would be appropriate.
neutral: Hmm. This has done little to improve my mood.
There is a certain... lack of refinement here.
Do try to elevate your craft before our next encounter.
Farewell.
satisfied: Ah... yes. This is quite lovely.
I feel positively serene... as though the world itself has softened.
Perhaps I misjudged you... just slightly.
Do not grow complacent. But... well done, Magetender.
angry: You have ruined my entire mood!
You will answer for this incompetence!

starting: Hey there, fellow adult! I'll just get the usu—ZOINKIES!!!
An Earthling?! I thought your species was extinct.
Not ever since we, the Martian Martial Arts, vaporized your home planet into oblivion.
BZZZZOHH!!! You don't seem thrilled!
Regardless, I need a nice, grounded yet elevated brew.
I'm wanting to feel a little 'down to Earth' between the two of us. Hehe—see what I did there?
Don't forget a mini umbrella on top of my potion!
neutral: Huh... this drink doesn't fully capture my senses.. it's okay.
Don't worry, even capturing Earthlings is easier than capturing the right balance of taste.
Here is your potion back. Don't think I'm done annihilating you Earthlings.
satisfied: ZOINKS! This is amazing—this is the good stuff!
I'll have to let all the Glorplings know about this tavern, Magetender!
angry: WHAT IN THE MILKY WAY DID YOU BREW ME?!
THIS TASTES LIKE THE CARBON POLLUTANTS YOU EARTHLINGS DISPEL ON MY HOME PLANET!!!
DUEL ME RIGHT NOW!!! YOU'LL LEARN WHY I HOLD THE TITLE OF ARES AFTER I ZOINK YOU!!!

starting: WAZZZZ good, my Earthling! Hopefully your day is as zorp-tastic as mine!
Anyway, can you make me a grounded yet elevated brew?
With an umbrella on top of my potion?
Something to blast my zorp-mind into full levitation!
neutral: Huh... this drink doesn't quite capture what I'm looking for.
Gnawing on unicorn horns gives me stronger zoomies than this... brew...
I expect an improvement when I return, little Earthling.
satisfied: ZOINKS! This gives me the zoomies I needed!
I feel like I'm levitating on a dreamlike planet, one where life on Mars is fully healed!
You have served me well, Magetender. Until next time.
angry: WHAT IN THE MILKY WAY IS THIS?! THIS TASTES LIKE SPACE JUNK!!!
NO WONDER I BZZZZOHH YOU, EARTHLING, FOR WHAT YOU'VE DONE!!!
PREPARE TO BE ZOINKED BY ARES!!!

starting: Wha- a new employee? *ribbit* interesting...
*ribbit* Salutations! you must be the new Magetender! the latest additon to the Fantasy Tavern team..
Guessing the ol' college-to-wizard pipe dream didn't pan out, huh? *ribbit*
Tough luck..
Well I'll go easy on you, seeing as it's your first day and all..
I'd like a brew that will calm me please! Let's see what you've got..
satisfied: Excellent work! This drink is not bad!
FOR A ROOKIE!!!
neutral: Excellent work! This drink is not bad!
FOR A ROOKIE!!!
